# Postmortem: short incident title

- **Date of incident:** YYYY-MM-DD
- **Duration:** from HH:MM to HH:MM (timezone)
- **Author:** ____
- **Severity:** SEV1 (outage) | SEV2 (major degradation) | SEV3 (minor)

## Summary
One or two plain sentences: what broke and who it affected.

## Impact
Who and what was affected, and for how long. Numbers if known (users, bookings, emails).

## Timeline
- HH:MM detected ...
- HH:MM diagnosed ...
- HH:MM mitigated ...
- HH:MM resolved ...

## Root cause
The actual underlying cause, not just the symptom. Blameless: describe the system and the
gap, not the person.

## Resolution
What fixed it.

## Prevention (follow-ups)
- [ ] Concrete action, owner, date. Link to a risks.md entry if it becomes tracked debt.

_File finished postmortems under docs/postmortems/ and link them from the week's bug
review._
